payload.title: Financial and Ridership Reports – Preliminary December 2023
payload.description: Preliminary 2023 year-end financial and ridership reports for NYCT, Staten Island Railway, and MTA Bus Company, compared to November Forecast

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Jaibala Patel, Deputy Chief Financial Officer, MTA

payload.gap_text: this report presents preliminary 2023 results that are compared to the November Forecast and are subject to change pending final year-end accounting adjustments and audit review
payload.description: The report states preliminary 2023 results are subject to change pending final year-end accounting adjustments and audit review. Actual amounts do not include post-close adjustments.

tool_args.label: NYCT Farebox Revenue Variance vs Forecast YTD Dec 2023
NYCT Farebox Operating Ratio YTD Dec 2023
NYCT Cost per Passenger YTD Dec 2023
NYCT Revenue per Passenger YTD Dec 2023
NYCT Subway Farebox Revenue Actual YTD Dec 2023
NYCT Bus Farebox Revenue Actual YTD Dec 2023
NYCT Subway Ridership Actual YTD Dec 2023
NYCT Bus Ridership Actual YTD Dec 2023
SIR Farebox Operating Ratio YTD Dec 2023
SIR Cost per Passenger YTD Dec 2023
SIR Revenue per Passenger YTD Dec 2023
SIR Farebox Revenue Actual YTD Dec 2023
MTA Bus Farebox Operating Ratio YTD Dec 2023
MTA Bus Cost per Passenger YTD Dec 2023
MTA Bus Revenue per Passenger YTD Dec 2023
MTA Bus Fixed Route Ridership Annual 2023

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenue variance of ($39.2) million (1.2%): Subway revenue under by $4.7 million (0.2 percent), and bus revenue under by $33.7 million (5.1 percent), primarily due to lower ridership
payload.subject: NYCT Farebox Revenue

payload.claim_text: Overtime variance of ($16.8) million (2.3%): Mainly due to vacancy / availability back-fill coverage
payload.subject: NYCT Overtime

payload.claim_text: Payroll variance of $25.8 million (0.7%): Primarily due to vacancies
payload.subject: NYCT Payroll

payload.claim_text: Claims variance of $39.7 million (15.4%): Mainly reflecting preliminary actuarial result
payload.subject: NYCT Claims

payload.claim_text: Overall increase of $132.4M or 22.1 percent compared to YTD Dec 2019; Overall increase of $10.5M or 1.5 percent compared to YTD Dec 2022; $16.8M or 2.3 percent above YTD Dec 2023 November Forecast
payload.subject: NYCT Non-Reimbursable Overtime

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenue Non Reimb variance of ($0.318) million (8.1%): Unfavorable due to lower than anticipated ridership
payload.subject: SIR Farebox Revenue

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Farebox Revenue Variance Explanation

payload.claim_text: Farebox Revenue Non Reimb variance of $0.460 million (0.3%): Higher average fare partially offset by lower ridership
payload.subject: MTA Bus Farebox Revenue

payload.claim_text: Overall increase of $14.3M or 18.6 percent compared to YTD Dec 2019; Overall decrease of -$0.1M or -0.1 percent compared to YTD Dec 2022; -$9.5M or -9.5 percent below YTD Dec 2023 Nov Forecast budget
payload.subject: MTA Bus Non-Reimbursable Overtime

tool_args.label: SIR Total Headcount at End of December

payload.claim_text: At the end of December total headcount was 350, which was 72 lower than the forecast of 422
payload.subject: SIR Headcount

payload.claim_text: At the end of December, total headcount was 3,663, which was 243 lower than the Forecast of 3,906. Non-Reimbursable positions were lower by 239 and Reimbursable positions were lower by 4.
payload.subject: MTA Bus Headcount

payload.description: MTA New York City Transit published the Financial and Ridership Reports
Jaibala Patel, Deputy Chief Financial Officer, MTA, is listed as the author/preparer of the report
